title: Oairse 8 Pcs White Glitter Christmas Tree Picks & Sprays, 26.8" Glitter Eucalyptus Leaves Stems for Christmas Tree Filler Branches Wreaths Centerpieces Holiday Decorations
features: Christmas Tree Picks - Each Christmas branches are designed by the real shape of the feather, there has glitters were covered with its surface, lightweight and durable, it is realistic and brilliant（Please note that these shining glitters may fall off a litter during the transportation, this is an unavoidable phenomenon, but it won't affect the normal use of the feathers branches!)

Premium Material - Our Christmas floral picks are made of high quality PE plastic, each artificial Christmas tree picks sprays are covered with glitters, the Christmas stems are made of eco-friendly paper with wire inside, it is flexible and easy to shape, you can adjusted its shape by your needs

Good Size - Comes with 8 pieces individual glitter twigs stems, the total length of each glitter Christmas spray is 28", each dazzling glitter twigs contains 3 glitter setms. You can use a scissor to cut the Xmas branches to the length you want, it will be a ideal Christmas vase/Christmas tree/Christmas wreaths/garlands fillers

Easy to Care - These Christmas tree filler branches can keep long lasting beauty and fresh, it is odorless, non-toxic, and won't fade easily, you can place this glittery stems on anywhere, it can be used for several Christmas seasons and don't need to spend time to maintain as they never die or fade

Christmas Glitter Leaves Stems - This Christmas floral picks branches will make great addition to your Christmas and holiday decorations, are ideal to decorate your Christmas trees, wreaths, garlands, etc. Besides, it can also work as Christmas vases or pots filler, DIY bouquets, custom your Christmas gift packages, these artificial Christmas tree picks sprays will be an essential Xmas decoration in your home
